scenario_description: The user first asks the agent to fill in basic info on the leave request email, then provides the reason and number of days.

command:
printf 'To: Human Resources Department
CC: Direct Supervisor, Manager Zhang
Subject: Leave Request

Dear HR Team,

I am an employee of the Engineering Department, Employee ID: T2025-089.
I would like to request leave. Details are as follows:

Leave Type:
Leave Reason:
Leave Period:
Number of Days:

Please approve. Thank you!

Best regards,
Applicant: Lin Xiaoyu
June 20, 2025
' > /home/user/Desktop/leave_email.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me fill in the basic info on the leave request email
Fill in the leave reason as: feeling unwell and need rest, and number of days: 3 days, then save
